---
title: "Effect of Family Income on Exam Performance"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

df <- read.csv("StudentPerformanceFactors.csv")

df$Family_Income        <- as.character(df$Family_Income)
df$Parental_Involvement <- as.character(df$Parental_Involvement)
df$Access_to_Resources  <- as.character(df$Access_to_Resources)

pi_levels  <- c("High", "Medium", "Low")
atr_levels <- c("High", "Medium", "Low")
pi_opts    <- c("All", pi_levels)
atr_opts   <- c("All", atr_levels)

income_colors <- c(
  "Low"    = "#EF553B",
  "Medium" = "#00CC96",
  "High"   = "#636EFA"
)

combos <- expand.grid(pi = pi_opts, atr = atr_opts, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

fig            <- plot_ly()
visibility_map <- list()
trace_index    <- 0

for (i in seq_len(nrow(combos))) {
  pi_val     <- combos$pi[i]
  atr_val    <- combos$atr[i]
  is_default <- (pi_val == "All" && atr_val == "All")

  sub <- df
  if (pi_val  != "All") sub <- sub[sub$Parental_Involvement == pi_val, ]
  if (atr_val != "All") sub <- sub[sub$Access_to_Resources  == atr_val, ]

  sub$Family_Income <- factor(sub$Family_Income, levels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"))

  for (inc in c("Low", "Medium", "High")) {
    sub_inc <- sub[sub$Family_Income == inc, ]
    scores  <- sub_inc$Exam_Score

    # Pre-compute box stats
    mn  <- round(mean(scores, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    q1  <- quantile(scores, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
    med <- median(scores, na.rm = TRUE)
    q3  <- quantile(scores, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    iqr <- q3 - q1
    lo  <- round(min(scores, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    hi  <- round(max(scores, na.rm = TRUE), 2)

    hover_text <- paste0(
      "<b>", inc, " Income</b><br>",
      "Max: ", hi,  "<br>",
      "Mean: ", mn, "<br>",
      "Median: ", med, "<br>",
      "Min: ", lo
    )

    fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
      x              = sub_inc$Family_Income,
      y              = scores,
      type           = "box",
      name           = inc,
      marker         = list(color = income_colors[[inc]]),
      line           = list(color = income_colors[[inc]]),
      fillcolor      = paste0(income_colors[[inc]], "55"),
      boxpoints      = "outliers",
      hoverinfo      = "none",          # disable box hover entirely
      visible        = is_default,
      legendgroup    = inc,
      showlegend     = (i == 0),
      offsetgroup    = inc,
      alignmentgroup = "fixed"
    )

    trace_index <- trace_index + 1
    visibility_map[[length(visibility_map) + 1]] <- list(
      pi = pi_val, atr = atr_val, trace = trace_index
    )

    # Invisible scatter point at median — carries the unified tooltip
    fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
      x          = inc,
      y          = med,
      type       = "scatter",
      mode       = "markers",
      name       = inc,
      legendgroup = inc,
      showlegend = FALSE,
      marker     = list(color = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", size = 40),  # fully transparent, large hit area
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "<b>", inc, " Income</b><br>",
        "Max: ", hi,  "<br>",
        "Mean: ", mn, "<br>",
        "Median: ", med, "<br>",
        "Min: ", lo,
        "<extra></extra>"
      ),
      visible    = is_default
    )

    trace_index <- trace_index + 1
    visibility_map[[length(visibility_map) + 1]] <- list(
      pi = pi_val, atr = atr_val, trace = trace_index
    )
    
    # Outlier points with tooltips
    outliers <- scores[scores < q1 - 1.5 * iqr | scores > q3 + 1.5 * iqr]
    if (length(outliers) > 0) {
      fig <- fig %>% add_trace(
        x             = rep(inc, length(outliers)),
        y             = outliers,
        type          = "scatter",
        mode          = "markers",
        name          = inc,
        legendgroup   = inc,
        showlegend    = FALSE,
        marker        = list(color = income_colors[[inc]], size = 6),
        hoverlabel    = list(bgcolor = "#000000", font = list(color = "#ffffff")),
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          "<b>", inc, " Income</b><br>",
          "Outlier: %{y}<br>",
          "<extra></extra>"
        ),
        visible = is_default
      )

      trace_index <- trace_index + 1
      visibility_map[[length(visibility_map) + 1]] <- list(
        pi = pi_val, atr = atr_val, trace = trace_index
      )
    }
  }
}

make_vis <- function(sel_pi, sel_atr) {
  vapply(visibility_map, function(m) m$pi == sel_pi && m$atr == sel_atr, logical(1))
}

pi_buttons <- lapply(pi_opts, function(pv) {
  list(method = "update",
       args   = list(list(visible = as.list(make_vis(pv, "All")))),
       label  = pv)
})

atr_buttons <- lapply(atr_opts, function(av) {
  list(method = "update",
       args   = list(list(visible = as.list(make_vis("All", av)))),
       label  = av)
})

fig <- fig %>%
  layout(
    title = list(
      text    = "Effect of Family Income on Exam Performance",
      x       = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y       = 0.97,
      yanchor = "top",
      font    = list(size = 16)
    ),
    xaxis = list(
      title         = "Family Income",
      type          = "category",
      categoryorder = "array",
      categoryarray = c("Low", "Medium", "High")
    ),
    yaxis   = list(title = "Exam Score"),
    boxmode = "overlay",
    margin  = list(t = 130, r = 30, b = 60, l = 60),

    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        type        = "dropdown",
        active      = 0,
        x           = 0.01,
        xanchor     = "left",
        y           = 1.10,
        yanchor     = "top",
        buttons     = pi_buttons,
        bgcolor     = "#ffffff",
        bordercolor = "#aaaaaa",
        font        = list(size = 12)
      ),
      list(
        type        = "dropdown",
        active      = 0,
        x           = 0.13,
        xanchor     = "left",
        y           = 1.10,
        yanchor     = "top",
        buttons     = atr_buttons,
        bgcolor     = "#ffffff",
        bordercolor = "#aaaaaa",
        font        = list(size = 12)
      )
    ),

    annotations = list(
      list(
        text      = "<b>Parental Involvement:</b>",
        x = 0,  xref = "paper", xanchor = "left",
        y = 1.17, yref = "paper", yanchor = "top",
        showarrow = FALSE, font = list(size = 12, color = "#333333")
      ),
      list(
        text      = "<b>Access to Resources:</b>",
        x = 0.12, xref = "paper", xanchor = "left",
        y = 1.17, yref = "paper", yanchor = "top",
        showarrow = FALSE, font = list(size = 12, color = "#333333")
      )
    )
  )

fig
```
